reference: Hi, I have numbness that started in my big toe, and I have not done anything about it. It has been two weeks. The likely cause could be that I was standing mostly in the same place for about five to seven hours. I am not doing that anymore, but the sensation has only worsened. Would resting reverse the symptoms?
text: Hi. I have numbness that started in my big toe, and I have not done anything about it. It has been two weeks. The only good cause could be that I was standing and resting in the same place for about five to seven hours. I am not doing that anymore, but the sensation is a little worsening. I've been resting for six months.
